name: Phyllo Blueberry Purse
recipeIngredient: Butter, melted for brushing phyllo dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw phyllo according to package directions.
2. Rinse and drain berries.
3. In a large mixing bowl, stir together sugar, cornstarch, and lemon zest.
4. Stir in berries gently until well combined.
5. Mix in lemon juice and almond extract.
6. To assemble:
- Line one 9-inch pie plate with a sheet of phyllo.
- Add blueberry mixture.
- Brush overhanging phyllo with butter and fold over berries to form a package.
7. Repeat steps 6-7 until using all 6 sheets of phyllo dough.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F.
9. Spray cookie sheet with nonstick cooking spray.
10. Arrange four phyllo sheets in a rectangle on the cookie sheet, overlapping each sheet so they form one corner of the rectangle.
11. Brush all over the phyllo with melted butter.
12. Place berry package in the center of the rectangle and twist together to create a ruffled topknot.
13. Bake for 30 minutes. Serve with powdered sugar.
